text: Find all the .rs files in src/ that contain the word 'unsafe', sorted by line count descending, top 5

input.command:
find src   -name   '*.rs'  
   |    xargs    grep    -l   'unsafe' 
  |  xargs   wc  -l 
  |   sort  -rn  |   head  -5  ;

blocks.text: Top 5 unsafe-containing files: bar.rs (120 lines), mem.rs (85), ffi.rs (42), wasm.rs (30), asm.rs (18).
